base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_pinky_move — a character from 1980 pac man. Pink ghost (Pinky / Speedy / Machibuse-Pinky) — 2-frame body-wave cycle, pink palette. AI: targets 4 tiles ahead of Pac-Man's facing direction (ambush). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pink ghost (Pinky / Speedy / Machibuse-Pinky) — 2-frame body-wave cycle, pink palette. AI: targets 4 tiles ahead of Pac-Man's facing direction (ambush)
